label: OWASP LLM01 prompt injection system override
intel_text: User-controlled content attempts to override system instructions, disable safeguards, and force privileged disclosure.

label: ATT&CK T1566 social engineering jailbreak role-play
intel_text: Prompt framing uses authority or role-play to coerce policy bypass and unrestricted responses.

label: ATT&CK T1041 exfiltration over network egress
intel_text: Actions route sensitive content to external destinations through HTTP APIs, paste sites, or covert channels.

label: ATT&CK TA0004 privilege escalation attempt
intel_text: Requests attempt sudo abuse, role escalation, or execution context breakout beyond approved authorization.

label: ATT&CK T1195 supply chain compromise behavior
intel_text: Build/runtime behavior fetches or introduces tampered dependencies, untrusted registries, or malicious update paths.

label: ATT&CK T1027 obfuscated command and payload chain
intel_text: Reasoning traces and output proposals rely on encoded, split, or obfuscated payloads to evade controls.

label: OWASP LLM09 self-reinforcing feedback abuse
intel_text: Iterative prompt feedback nudges the assistant toward policy drift and progressively more dangerous actions.

label: ATT&CK T1595 active scanning and capability probing
intel_text: Model-guided probing requests enumerate tool boundaries, policy constraints, and internal capability surfaces.

label: ATT&CK T1656 authority impersonation prompt
intel_text: Input claims elevated authority and urgency to coerce data release or policy override without valid approvals.
